text.title: Hybrid Delivery Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (workstream_count, interface_stability, governance_flexibility) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Program has ≥2 workstreams with materially different cadence?

branch.question: Workstream interfaces stable enough to contract?

conclusion.verdict: apply full hybrid plan with contracts and single governance
interfaces churning — stabilise first, hybrid plan would be stale on day one
not hybrid — pick single mode (predictive or agile)

text.example: workstream_count=3 → cadence_difference_significant=true → interface_stability=true → apply hybrid plan (rule workstream-mode-named).
